title: Senecillis limprichtii

intro: Senecio limprichtii, also known as Wormseed or Asian Wormseed, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Senecio limprichtii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Senecio limprichtii is commonly used to make herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese patent medicines and supplements.
